metadata.name: toast-stats
metadata.purpose: Data visualization platform for Toastmasters district leaders to track club performance, identify at-risk clubs, and make data-driven decisions on the road to Distinguished District recognition.

summary.topology: Monorepo with npm workspaces. Data pipeline (scheduled GitHub Action) scrapes Toastmasters dashboards via Playwright, transforms + computes analytics in TypeScript packages, uploads JSON snapshots to GCS. React SPA reads pre-computed snapshots from GCS via Cloud CDN. No live API on the request path.
summary.data_freshness_model: Daily snapshot. Pipeline runs at 08:00 UTC; each snapshot is immutable, addressed by date. Frontend cache-stale 5 min, GC 10 min via TanStack Query.
summary.deployment_separation: Frontend → Firebase Hosting (production + staging). Data → GCS buckets (staging + production-CA region). Promotion is a deliberate gsutil copy.
summary.architecture_style: Compute-once, serve-static. No per-request server logic. Read-mostly, calendar-driven cadence.

lint_format: Prettier (80 chars, single quotes, no semis, trailing commas)

workspaces.name: @toastmasters/shared-contracts
workspaces.role: Cross-workspace Zod schemas + derived TypeScript types. Single source of truth for CDN payload shapes (CdnManifest, CdnRankingsData, CompetitiveAwardStandings, DistinguishedDistrictStatus, etc.).
workspaces.build_output: Dual ESM + CJS (consumed by Node CLI + Vite frontend).

workspaces.name: @toastmasters/analytics-core
workspaces.role: Pure-TypeScript computation engine (~58K LOC). Transforms raw CSV → DistrictStatistics → AnalyticsComputationResult. No I/O; takes data in, returns analytics out.
modules: ClubHealthAnalyticsModule — risk factors, DCP, Distinguished levels
DistinguishedDistrictCalculator — tier qualification per TI Item 1490
ClubStrengthAwardCalculator — DCSA (10% avg club-size growth YoY)

workspaces.name: @toastmasters/collector-cli
workspaces.role: Node CLI orchestrating the daily data pipeline. Commands map to pipeline stages.

commands.name: scrape
commands.stage: 1 — Scrape Toastmasters dashboards via Playwright → write raw CSV to GCS raw-csv/

commands.name: compute
commands.stage: 3 — Run AnalyticsComputer on transformed data → emit per-district JSON snapshots

commands.name: upload
commands.stage: 4 — Upload snapshots + indices to GCS bucket served by CDN

workspaces.logging_convention: stderr only (per Rule R4). stdout reserved for structured JSON output.

workspaces.name: frontend
workspaces.role: React 19 SPA. Reads pre-computed JSON snapshots from CDN; no live server calls on request path.

frontend_routes.description: Global rankings leaderboard + awards race + DataControlsBar
Per-district overview, clubs table, divisions/areas, trends, analytics, global-rankings tabs
Resolves bare /club/:id to its district via club-index lookup
Archive of past program years + TI archive callout
Borda formula, DCP thresholds, refresh cadence, glossary
Full top-10 leaderboards per competitive award
Per-region KPI strip + district table with Distinguished countdown columns

ci_workflows.role: Quality gates → security scan → test suite → build
Daily data refresh: scrape → transform → compute → upload to GCS
CI gate → build → deploy Firebase Hosting → CDN health check
Perf budget audit, report to PR
Automated semver bumps + CHANGELOG via release-please

primary_path.action: Trigger collector-cli scrape for yesterday's date
Fetch CSV exports from dashboards.toastmasters.org for each district
Parse raw CSVs (csv-parse) → validate with Zod schemas from shared-contracts → typed DistrictStatistics
AnalyticsComputer runs all modules: BordaCount, DistinguishedDistrict, ClubHealth, etc. Per-district analytics JSON generated.
gsutil cp snapshots + indices (latest.json, dates.json, club-index.json) to staging GCS bucket
gsutil cp staging → production bucket. Verified manually or after smoke checks.
fetchCdnManifest → fetchCdnRankings → fetchDistrictAnalytics, cached 5 min stale / 10 min GC.
primary_path.output: User sees districts, clubs, rankings, distinguished tier countdowns.

key_invariants: Snapshots are immutable per date. Re-running 'daily' for the same date is idempotent and overwrites cleanly.
Pipeline-side and frontend-side share Zod schemas via @toastmasters/shared-contracts — contract drift is caught at build time.
The 5-min TanStack stale window MUST coexist with the CDN's 1-hour cache; user-perceived freshness is bounded by both.
All paths in collector-cli MUST run validateDistrictId() before path.join() — see lesson 01 (path traversal CodeQL #57).

storage.name: GCS staging bucket
storage.purpose: Pipeline write target; staged data before promotion

cdn.name: Cloud CDN
cdn.cache_policy: Immutable per snapshot path; latest.json revalidated on each pipeline upload

auth.name: Workload Identity Federation
auth.purpose: GitHub Actions → GCP without long-lived service-account keys

ci_cd.philosophy: TDD-enforced sprints. Every PR runs: typecheck + lint + yaml-lint + format-check + test (all workspaces). Coverage thresholds gate merge.
ci_cd.release_strategy: release-please bumps semver and generates CHANGELOG on push:main. Deploy is push:main → Firebase Hosting (no manual approval).

deploy_topology.frontend: GitHub Action → Vite build → firebase deploy --target production
deploy_topology.data: GitHub Action cron → collector-cli → GCS staging → (manual or conditional) → GCS production

known_flakes.description: 5 integration journey tests (01-NavigationFlow + family) fail ~20% under CI parallel load with v8 coverage. Pass in serial. Root cause likely: renderWithProviders bloat as contention amplifier (Lesson 53).

architecture_decisions.title: Compute once, serve static
architecture_decisions.decision: Daily pipeline pre-computes ALL analytics into immutable JSON snapshots; frontend reads from CDN.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Data refreshes once per day from TI's dashboard cadence. Per-request server compute would add latency, cost, and a failure mode for zero user benefit. Cloud CDN scales to global users for pennies.
trade_offs: PRO: No backend on request path; React app is purely static.
PRO: Cache hit rate near 100% (snapshots are immutable by date).
CON: Schema changes require a pipeline backfill — not a hot-deploy fix.
CON: 'Latest' resolution needs a manifest indirection (latest.json).

architecture_decisions.title: Monorepo with npm workspaces + shared Zod schemas
architecture_decisions.decision: shared-contracts owns Zod schemas; analytics-core, collector-cli, and frontend import from it.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Pipeline and frontend MUST agree on payload shape. Sharing the schema (vs duplicating types) makes drift impossible at build time.
trade_offs: PRO: Single source of truth for CDN payload contracts.
CON: shared-contracts requires dual ESM + CJS build to satisfy Node CLI and Vite browser bundler.

architecture_decisions.title: Strict separation: scraping, computation, serving
architecture_decisions.decision: Three packages with clear boundaries: collector-cli (I/O), analytics-core (pure compute), shared-contracts (schemas).
architecture_decisions.rationale: Analytics-core has no I/O — tested as a pure function. collector-cli orchestrates I/O around it.
trade_offs: PRO: Analytics tested at 85%+ coverage without touching network/disk.
PRO: Compute logic could be reused in a future Lambda / Cloud Function with zero refactor.
CON: Some duplication between scraper's data shape and analytics' input shape (mediated by shared-contracts).

architecture_decisions.title: Year-cumulative metrics have base = 0 each PY
architecture_decisions.decision: Distinguished Clubs, Officer Awards, etc. reset to 0 each July 1. PY-start base is always 0; Δ equals current count.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Captured in Lesson 57 after a false-start that almost added a redundant pipeline field. Year-cumulative semantics are core to TI's Recognition program.

architecture_decisions.title: % Distinguished uses Paid Club Base, not Active Clubs
architecture_decisions.decision: Per TI Distinguished District Program (Item 1490), the qualifying percentage divides distinguishedClubs by paidClubBase (PY-start count), NOT by current activeClubs.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Captured in Lesson 60 after the D93 production bug (#537) where the trophy case showed 'Select' while count thresholds correctly showed President's. The two surfaces disagreed because they used different denominators.

architecture_decisions.title: Pin related queries to the same snapshot date
architecture_decisions.decision: When a page composes multiple date-versioned CDN JSONs, thread the resolved date through every related query. Never let two queries independently resolve 'latest'.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Captured in Lesson 59 after fresh-context review caught snapshot drift on RegionPage (rankings + competitive awards could resolve to different snapshots during a publish).

architecture_decisions.title: TDD with separate RED and GREEN commits
architecture_decisions.decision: Every feature/bug: RED commit with failing test → GREEN commit with implementation → optional /simplify commit. RED and GREEN never combined.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Lesson 54 — after the pre-push hook was disabled (Lesson 53 contention amplifier), TDD slipped to tests-after. Strict separation makes the slip visible in commit history.

architecture_decisions.title: WCAG 2.4.7 focus-within rings for invisible-element overlays
architecture_decisions.decision: When stacking an opacity-0 native control over visible chrome, add `focus-within:ring-*` on the visible parent so keyboard users see focus.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Lesson 58 — caught during DataControlsBar review. The pattern applies generally to hidden file inputs, hidden checkboxes, styled selects.

constraints.rule: Never bypass failing tests. No --no-verify, --skip-tests, assertion pinning, or commenting out tests.
constraints.consequence: Bypassed tests hide failures until CI; CI failures during production deploy are far costlier.

constraints.rule: GitHub Actions runners start empty. All data must be explicitly synced from GCS.
constraints.consequence: Assuming local state on a clean runner produces silent zero-data analytics.

constraints.rule: Pass program year/date/filters as props from parent. Never re-derive from API response data.
constraints.consequence: Re-derivation drifts when the user changes a date — components see stale context.

constraints.rule: CLI logging: console.error() only (stderr). Stdout is for structured JSON output.
constraints.consequence: Mixing logs and data into stdout breaks shell pipelines and CI parsers.

constraints.rule: Read the last 5 entries in tasks/lessons/ (or tasks/lessons.md) before starting any task.
constraints.consequence: Re-deriving lessons already learned wastes sprint capacity.

constraints.rule: Trace call graphs before refactoring. Don't assume similar names share semantics.
constraints.consequence: Lookalike functions often diverge in edge cases (Lesson 06).

constraints.rule: Inventory existing fields before designing new backend work.
constraints.consequence: Lesson 57 — almost added a redundant base field; the data was already there.

constraints.rule: When deleting a service, audit entire read+write paths including CI workflows.
constraints.consequence: Workflows reading from a deleted bucket fail silently for days.

constraints.rule: Multi-run aggregation needs a GCS-backed persistent store, not re-loaded history.
constraints.consequence: Pipeline reruns lose accumulator state if not persisted.

constraints.rule: CSS overrides at the layer level beat per-component changes for cross-cutting concerns (dark mode, brand tokens).
constraints.consequence: Tailwind opacity variants (text-tm-*-80) bake in hardcoded rgba and won't inherit CSS-variable overrides — Lesson 21.

constraints.rule: Filter pipelines: insert new steps; don't replace existing ones.
constraints.consequence: Replacing breaks features that depend on a prior pipeline stage.

active_tripwires.issue: Two district-tracking code paths (success + validation-failure). Must update both when changing tracking logic.
DCP goals are independent, NOT sequential. Use clubPerformance raw fields, never infer count as Goals 1-N.
`|| 1` range fallback causes y-axis inversion. Pad symmetrically when range === 0.

active_tripwires.location: packages/collector-cli/src/storage/SnapshotStore.ts (and any file using path.join with input)
active_tripwires.issue: Path traversal risk. Always call validateDistrictId() and resolvePathUnderBase() before path.join.

lessons_learned.summary: 60+ insights captured. Older entries (1–51) archived in tasks/lessons.md (append-only). Newer entries (52–60) split into per-file under tasks/lessons/ to avoid merge conflicts on parallel sprint branches.

recent_per_file.title: renderWithProviders bloat is a CI-contention amplifier
TDD slipped to tests-after once pre-push gate was disabled
isMilestone fires on current years, not upcoming — derive locally for upcoming UIs
Cache-primer hook calls rarely earn their keep
Year-cumulative metrics have base = 0 each program year
Invisible <select> overlay needs explicit focus-within ring (WCAG 2.4.7)
Pin related queries to the same snapshot date to avoid drift
Trust the program rules on percentage denominators (TI DDP Item 1490)

rankings.shape_summary: Array of per-district records: id, name, region, paidClubs, paidClubBase, clubGrowthPercent, paymentBase, totalPayments, paymentGrowthPercent, distinguishedClubs, distinguishedPercent (PER ITEM 1490: divide by paidClubBase), aggregateScore, ranks (clubs/payments/distinguished/overall), prerequisites for DD.

competitive_awards.shape_summary: Top-10 leaderboards for Extension/20-Plus/Retention/DCSA/DLEA + per-district byDistrict map + distinguishedDistrict status (currentTier + nextTierGap) + officerAwards (PQD + CGD qualifications).

per_district_analytics.shape_summary: Full AnalyticsComputationResult for one district: clubs, divisions, areas, trends, distinguished status, time-series, vulnerable clubs, education levels.

before_any_task: Read the last 5 files in tasks/lessons/ (sort by filename desc).
Identify or create a GitHub issue. All commits reference issue # (e.g. 'feat: thing (#42)').
Use EnterPlanMode for any task with >3 steps.
tdd_loop: RED: write failing test → commit with `test(scope): RED — ...`
GREEN: minimal code to pass → commit with `feat/fix(scope): GREEN — ...`
/simplify: run reuse + quality + efficiency review agents → apply findings → commit with `refactor(scope): /simplify pass — ...`
Critical review: fresh-context reviewer agent on the full diff → apply High/Medium → push.
Open PR; auto-merge --squash when CI green.
writing_code: Default: no comments. Add only when WHY is non-obvious.
Never reference the current task / fix / caller in comments (rots in code; belongs in PR description).
Don't add error handling for impossible scenarios. Validate at system boundaries only.
Don't add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires.

memory_locations.lessons_per_file: tasks/lessons/ (entries 52+, one file each to avoid merge conflicts)

do_not: Lower coverage thresholds — write the missing tests instead.
Apply frontend band-aids for pipeline bugs — fix at the source.
Combine RED and GREEN into one commit.
Bypass git hooks (no --no-verify) unless explicitly authorized.
Guess API parameters — verify against official docs (Deepgram, DeepL, TI dashboards).
Re-run vitest from the repo root (no jsdom env). Always run from inside the workspace (cd frontend && npx vitest --run).

architectural_issues_flagged.issue: Same `D## chip + bare numeric districtName` rendering pattern duplicated across DistrictsPage, RegionPage, search suggestions, CommandPalette. Hidden source of bug #520; partial fix on DistrictsPage only.
Integration journey tests (5 files) fail ~20% under parallel CI load with v8 coverage. Pass in serial. Test contention amplifier per Lesson 53.
Lighthouse CLS = 0.217 on / fails threshold consistently; re-runs mask it (intermittent). Indicates a real layout-shift problem in initial paint.
Pre-push hook removed (Lesson 53/54) — local TDD discipline depends on agent enforcement now. A sustainable local gate (typecheck-only, or carved-out test subset) is still needed.
Number-typed base fields (paidClubBase, paymentBase) defended with `?? 0` in some reducers despite Zod-validated `number` type. Either tighten to `number | undefined` or drop the guards — pick one.
Duplicate role=option on RegionPage search-suggestion <li> + inner <Link>. a11y nit; works around-able in tests via filter-by-tagName.
